# Astroid

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Astroid icon">

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Astroid;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Astroid { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
star, math, shape, curve, sharp, four-pointed, hypocycloid, ai, artificial intelligence

## Categories
shapes, math
